news_items.headline: Mets Notes: Carlos Mendoza talks controversial call on Juan Soto in ninth inning, bats going cold in crunch time
news_items.summary: Mets manager Carlos Mendoza met with the media to talk about the ninth-inning controversy involving Juan Soto's overturned home run in Saturday's loss to the Braves.

news_items.headline: Tough outing for Gibson sinks Orioles in 9-3 loss to Padres
news_items.summary: Some late-game drama about hit by pitch etiquette might be the only thing that Orioles fans need to think about coming out of this game.

news_items.headline: Mets’ Sean Manaea solid again in first six-inning outing since 2024 NLDS
news_items.summary: Sean Manaea was terrific again for the Mets, holding the high-powered Braves in check in his first six-inning outing of the season Saturday afternoon.
